name: spawn_agent
description: Spawn a sub-agent from the available agents directory to work on a delegated task. By default blocks until the sub-agent finishes and returns its final report. Set background:true to launch it in parallel and get a handle immediately — its result arrives later as a message, and you can cancel it with cancel_child. Sub-agents run under your permission rules and share your token budget.

agent.description: Name of the sub-agent to spawn (must be listed in the agents directory).

task.description: The task for the sub-agent to perform.

background.description: Launch in parallel and return a handle immediately (default false = block until done). The result arrives later as a message.

inputs.description: Artifacts to place into the sub-agent's workspace before it starts.
